vocab.meaning: thánh đường của sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: I view art galleries as a sanctuary of creativity where I can escape the mundane pressures of daily life.

vocab.meaning: triển lãm được chọn lọc và sắp xếp kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: This gallery is renowned for its curated exhibitions that showcase a cohesive narrative of modern history.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp tinh tế, không phô trương
vocab.example: I’m drawn to minimalist paintings that exude a sense of understated elegance and quiet sophistication.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ những giới hạn/khuôn mẫu sẵn có
vocab.example: I admire avant-garde artists who use digital media to push the boundaries of traditional portraiture.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh khơi gợi (cảm xúc, ký ức)
vocab.example: The evocative power of the abstract sculptures left me reflecting on my own childhood memories.

vocab.meaning: bắt mắt, thu hút sự chú ý mạnh mẽ ngay lập tức
vocab.example: The centerpiece of the gallery was a visually arresting mural that dominated the entire main hall.
Exploring different artistic mediums, from oil on canvas to recycled plastics, is what makes gallery visits so fascinating.

vocab.meaning: sự đơn giản đến thuần khiết/trần trụi
vocab.example: There is a certain beauty in the stark simplicity of charcoal sketches that more colorful works often lack.

vocab.meaning: lời bình luận/phản ánh về văn hóa
vocab.example: Many of the street art pieces displayed inside the gallery serve as a sharp cultural commentary on consumerism.

vocab.meaning: tạo được sự đồng cảm/kết nối tâm hồn với
vocab.example: The themes of loneliness and resilience in those paintings really resonate with me on a personal level.
